leads.name: BlazeVOX Books
leads.title: Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: Buffalo-area independent press founded 2005 by Geoffrey Gatza; has published nearly 200 experimental poetry and fiction titles. Roughly 12-15 titles/year, well under the 25-title threshold. ~200 miles from Ann Arbor. Named publisher email confirmed via blazevox.org with Titan MX. CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Tarpaulin Sky Press
leads.title: Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: Independent hybrid-text and poetry press founded 2006 by Christian Peet; based in Vermont. Publishes 4-6 titles/year of experimental and genre-crossing work. Contact email confirmed via Outlook/Exchange MX. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: FlowerSong Press
leads.title: Publisher and Director
leads.notes: McAllen, TX Latinx poetry and literary press founded by Edward Vidaurre. 12-15 titles/year; recently published Juan Felipe Herrera. 2022 inductee to Texas Institute of Letters. CLMP member. flowersongpress.com has Google MX confirmed. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Codhill Press
leads.title: Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: New Paltz, NY independent press founded by philosopher David Appelbaum; publishes poetry and philosophical/spiritual writing. ~6-8 titles/year. codhill.com uses MailChannels MX. Poets & Writers listing updated February 2026. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: MadHat Press
leads.title: Editor-in-Chief and Publisher
leads.notes: Cheshire, MA independent press founded 2010 by Carol Novack and Marc Vincenz; publishes 8-12 titles/year. CLMP member. madhat-press.com MX confirmed. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Lynx House Press
leads.title: Founder and Editor
leads.notes: Spokane, WA independent poetry press founded 1975 by Christopher Howell; one of the oldest continuously operating indie poetry presses in the US. Publishes 5-8 titles/year. Gmail press account confirmed. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: MoonPath Press
leads.title: Publisher and Editor
leads.notes: Newport, OR independent poetry press run by Lana Hechtman Ayers; also publishes Concrete Wolf chapbook series. ~8-10 titles/year. moonpathpress.com self-referential MX -- using moonpathpress@yahoo.com (Yahoo MX confirmed). CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Gival Press
leads.title: Publisher and Editor-in-Chief
leads.notes: Arlington, VA award-winning independent literary press founded 1998 by Robert L. Giron. ~5 titles/year through contests. Not accepting general manuscript queries since January 2024 but actively publishing contest winners. ~490 miles from Ann Arbor. givalpress@yahoo.com (Yahoo MX confirmed). CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Gasher Press
leads.title: Editor and Publisher
leads.notes: Denver, CO independent literary press run by Whitney Peper; publishes poetry and fiction. ~5-6 titles/year. whitney@gasherpress.com (Google MX confirmed). Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Black Square Editions
leads.title: Editorial Staff
leads.notes: New York City independent press publishing poetry with emphasis on LGBTQ+ and experimental voices. ~5-8 titles/year. bse@offtheparkpress.org (GoDaddy MX confirmed). blacksquareeditions.org has no MX. No named individual contact publicly findable. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Shanti Arts
leads.title: Publisher
leads.notes: Brunswick, ME independent press run by Christine Cote; publishes poetry, memoir, and art books. ~10-12 titles/year. publisher@shantiarts.com (Google MX confirmed). CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: The Bitter Oleander Press
leads.title: Founder and Editor
leads.notes: Fayetteville, NY press founded 1974 by Paul B. Roth; publishes The Bitter Oleander poetry journal alongside book titles. ~3-4 books/year. ~430 miles from Ann Arbor. info@bitteroleander.com (MX via mountainair.net confirmed). Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Baobab Press
leads.title: Publisher and Executive Editor
leads.notes: Reno, NV independent literary press; Publisher and Executive Editor Christine E. Kelly; focuses on literature of the American West. ~6-8 titles/year. baobabpress.com MX confirmed. CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Dos Gatos Press
leads.title: Co-Editor and Publisher
leads.notes: Albuquerque, NM micropress run by Scott Wiggerman and David Meischen. ~4-6 titles/year; known for Wingbeats poetry series. editors@dosgatospress.org (own mail MX confirmed). Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Headmistress Press
leads.title: Co-Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: Sequim, WA press founded 2013 by Risa Denenberg and Mary Meriam; premier publisher of lesbian poetry in the US. ~8-10 titles/year. headmistresspress.com has no MX but headmistresspress@gmail.com (Gmail) is deliverable. CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Red Mountain Press
leads.title: Publisher
leads.notes: Santa Fe, NM poetry press founded by RD Ross. ~4-6 poetry collections/year; runs the Red Mountain Press Poetry Prize. redmtnpress@gmail.com (Gmail) confirmed. redmountainpress.us uses IONOS MX. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Wayfarer Books
leads.title: Founder and Editor-in-Chief
leads.notes: Northampton, MA trans-owned independent literary press; formerly Homebound Publications (rebranded as Wayfarer Books in 2024). ~10-12 titles/year of literary fiction, poetry, and essays. wolfe@wayfarerbooks.org (ProtonMail MX confirmed). CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Aqueduct Press
leads.title: Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: Seattle, WA feminist speculative fiction press founded 2004 by L. Timmi Duchamp. ~8-12 titles/year including the Conversation Pieces series. CLMP member. aqueductpress.com MX confirmed. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Shipwreckt Books
leads.title: Managing Editor and CEO
leads.notes: Winona, MN independent press run by Tom Driscoll; publishes poetry, fiction, and creative nonfiction with strong Midwestern sensibility. ~8-10 titles/year. CLMP member. shipwrecktbooks.com uses Google MX. ~600 miles from Ann Arbor. Not in customer list or previous runs.

leads.name: Cervena Barva Press
leads.title: Founder and Publisher
leads.notes: West Somerville, MA (Boston area) independent poetry press founded 2005 by Gloria Mindock; publishes poetry, fiction, and translations with international reach. ~8-12 titles/year. Celebrating 20 years in 2025. cervenabarvapress.com uses IONOS MX. CLMP member. Not in customer list or previous runs.
